name: Very Blueberry Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the vanilla wafer crumbs and melted margarine. Press the mixture into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan. Chill.
2. Soften the gelatin in cold water, then stir over low heat until dissolved. Gradually add the gelatin to the softened cream cheese, mixing at medium speed on an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Blend in the lemon juice and grated lemon peel. Beat in the marshmallow creme; fold in the whipped topping. Puree the blueberries and fold into the cream cheese mixture.
4. Chill until firm. Garnish with additional frozen whipped topping, thawed, and lemon peel.
VARIATIONS:
Substitute Neufchatel cheese for cream cheese.
Substitute strawberry slices for blueberries
Substitute raspberries for blueberries
